bind.description: TCP bind address for websocket and HTTP endpoints.

store.description: Path to the SQLite/Turso local event store file.

relay_url.description: Public relay URL used for AUTH relay tag checks and NIP metadata.

allow_protected_events.description: Enable publishing protected events with '-' tag (requires AUTH).

min_pow_difficulty.description: Minimum NIP-13 PoW difficulty for accepted events (leading zero bits in event id).

nip05_domain.description: Fixed domain for NIP-05 /.well-known/nostr.json responses. If omitted/null, Host header is used.
